original_image_tags: A manila folder cover or divider sheet, slightly yellowed with age. The folder has punched holes at the top and bottom edges. In the top right corner, a case number is handwritten.

elements.description: A plain yellow/orange manila folder or envelope back. Handwritten text '62-83894-111' in blue and red ink is visible at the top right. Three punched holes are present (one top center, two bottom).

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the main visual content—a yellow/orange manila folder with punched holes—and the handwritten text, but Description B specifies a three-hole pattern and a different ink color detail without contradicting the core claim about the case number.
